principle: At L4 and L4.5, runtime code is an interpreter of external contracts, roles, policies, recipes and knowledge records. New tasks should change configuration or registries by default, not Python code.
code_change_allowed_only_for: new deterministic parser required by repeated confirmed cases
code_change_forbidden_for: adding role identity as Python constant
required_evidence_before_code_change: configuration route is missing or insufficient
existing interpreter cannot express the task safely
change adds a reusable primitive rather than a one-off solution
tests cover the new primitive and its refusal path
